standard: Guide to Road Design (Austroads, NZ-adopted) / NZTA supplement
notes: NZ adopts the Austroads Guide to Road Design (AGRD Part 3) as primary authority; the current Austroads guide is login/purchase-gated. NZTA hosts a FREE official document: the State Highway Geometric Design Manual (SHGDM, NZTA, Dec 2000), downloaded in parts. Designated file = Part 2 Basic design criteria (32 pp). Also retrieved and validated 8 more SHGDM parts in this folder: Part 1 intro (14pp), Part 3 design form (8pp), Part 4 horizontal alignment (30pp), Part 5 vertical alignment (16pp), Part 6 cross section (22pp), Part 7 roadside features (36pp), glossary (26pp), appendix A&B (20pp). Part 8 (intersections) was a 27KB stub that failed validation and was deleted. All from official nzta.govt.nz/assets. NZTA also lists supplementary technical memoranda TM2501 (superelevation), TM2502 (water run-off), TM2503 (edge protection/medians).
